$schema: Multi-speaker dialogue demo. Scenes can mix single-narrator and multi-speaker formats.
globalStyle: Conversational and natural — like two colleagues who know each other well discussing a product. Don't over-perform; let pauses breathe.

dialogue.speaker: Arup
dialogue.text: Neil, you've been pressure-testing this with mid-market CFOs the last few weeks. What's actually landing?

dialogue.speaker: Neil
dialogue.text: What lands hardest is the always-on part. [pause] They get it instantly when they see the alert before any report would have surfaced it.

dialogue.speaker: Arup
dialogue.text: Show me what you mean. [pause] This anomaly here — what is it telling us?

dialogue.speaker: Neil
dialogue.text: Inventory mismatch in the southern region. Twelve hours ahead of any weekly report. The CFO sees this in the morning, not next Friday.

scenes.narration: Always-on. Not a dashboard you visit — a system that's already working.
